'''kathodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ofatumumab|ofatumumab]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-th-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ofatumumab|ofatumumab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kathodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæthedeth|kæthedeth]] || [[word:kæthedej|kæthedej]] || [[word:kæthedesh|kæthedesh]] || [[word:kæthede|kæthede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kathothodoth|kathothodoth]] || [[word:kathothodoj|kathothodoj]] || [[word:kathothodosh|kathothodosh]] || [[word:kathothodo|kathothodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kathodoth|kathodoth]] || [[word:kathodoj|kathodoj]] || [[word:kathodosh|kathodosh]] || [[word:kathodo|kathodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kathofdofth|kathofdofth]] || [[word:kathofdofj|kathofdofj]] || [[word:kathofdofsh|kathofdofsh]] || [[word:kathofdof|kathofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kathodotho|kathodotho]] || [[word:kathodojo|kathodojo]] || [[word:kathodosho|kathodosho]] || [[word:kathodoko|kathodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kathodoth|kathodoth]] || [[word:kathodoj|kathodoj]] || [[word:kathodosh|kathodosh]] || [[word:kathodo|kathodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kathodothol|kathodothol]] || [[word:kathodojol|kathodojol]] || [[word:kathodoshol|kathodoshol]] || [[word:kathodokol|kathodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kathodoothotho|kathodoothotho]] || [[word:kathodoojojo|kathodoojojo]] || [[word:kathodooshosho|kathodooshosho]] || [[word:kathodooko|kathodooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kathodothon|kathodothon]] || [[word:kathodojon|kathodojon]] || [[word:kathodoshon|kathodoshon]] || [[word:kathodokon|kathodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kathodothooro|kathodothooro]] || [[word:kathodojooro|kathodojooro]] || [[word:kathodoshooro|kathodoshooro]] || [[word:kathodokooro|kathodokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
